examples: Prehistoric humans never threw spears at Tyrannosaurus rex but really did hunt mammoths and mastodons.
In a short story from "Toy Story", Rex's green tyrannosaurus really seemed to jump out of the screen, and the audience was impressed.
The Field Museum of Natural History sports one of the largest, most complete Tyrannosaurus rex fossils around.
After the sale of Tyrannosaurus Sue, a modern gold rush began, and it has not let up.
